assigned.title: Assigned Pickups

assigned.howToCompleteDesc: Tap "Complete Pickup" when you arrive. An OTP will be sent to the user's phone. Ask them for the code, enter it here, and optionally upload a photo of the collected scrap.
assigned.otpExpiredMsg: OTP has expired. Use "Re-send OTP" to generate a fresh one.
assigned.toastOtpFailed: Failed to generate OTP. Please try again.
assigned.toastVerifyFailed: OTP verification failed. Please try again.
assigned.toastOtpExpired: OTP has expired. Generate a new one.
